author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو العباس أحمد بن علي القلقشندي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent scholar in Arabic literature, history, and genealogy, known for his comprehensive works on Arab tribes and their lineages.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A major reference work on Arab genealogy, widely consulted by later scholars.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the most important works on Arab genealogy, providing detailed information on Arab tribes and their lineages.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: إبراهيم الإبياري is a respected editor known for his careful and scholarly approach to textual editing.
